justification: Some devcontainers mount /tmp with noexec, which can stop Go's temporary test/build binaries from running at all. This must be surfaced explicitly so operators move GOTMPDIR/GOCACHE into the workspace and rerun the real gate.

Some harnesses forbid listener binds, which makes otherwise healthy Go tests fail with a socket sandbox error instead of a product regression. Allow only this environmental class so the gate reports the sandbox limitation explicitly.
